_provenance: schema-derived from AC-V3.1 bot_state['fleet_correlation_alert'] shape spec. No producer-computed values. ISO timestamp format matches exit_triggers ts_et convention.
description: Expected shape of bot_state['fleet_correlation_alert'] when tripped

key_types.tripped_at_et: str — ISO format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS (ET timezone, no offset suffix)
key_types.triggered_reason: str — same string as the exit_triggers.triggered_reason that crossed the threshold
key_types.tripped_count: int — number of distinct symphonies that fired the same reason in the window
key_types.active_count: int — total active symphonies at detection time

absent_when_not_tripped: bot_state must NOT contain the key 'fleet_correlation_alert' when no alert is active — key absent (None at API layer)
